# Bond Mortgage Solutions

> Bond Mortgage Solutions is a licensed Texas mortgage advisory firm led by Peter Njoku (NMLS #2670329), helping families across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex achieve homeownership through personalized loan guidance.

## About

Bond Mortgage Solutions provides mortgage loan origination services in Texas, specializing in FHA, VA, USDA, Conventional, and refinance loans. The company is licensed under Mortgage Funding Solutions (Company NMLS #1972934) and serves clients throughout the DFW area including Dallas, Garland, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Royse City, Rockwall, and surrounding communities.

## Services

- FHA Loans: Low down payment options for first-time and repeat buyers
- VA Loans: Zero down payment mortgages for eligible veterans and active military
- USDA Loans: Rural and suburban homebuying with no down payment
- Conventional Loans: Flexible financing for qualified buyers
- Refinance: Rate-and-term and cash-out refinance options
- Down Payment Assistance: Texas programs for qualifying buyers
- Pre-Approval: Fast pre-approval to strengthen purchase offers

## Contact

- Website: https://bondmortgagesolutions.com

- NMLS: #2670329

## Service Areas

Dallas, Garland, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Allen, Richardson, Irving, Arlington, Fort Worth, Denton, Lewisville, Flower Mound, Grapevine, Southlake, Mansfield, Rockwall, Royse City, Forney, Prosper

## Licensing

Bond Mortgage Solutions operates under Mortgage Funding Solutions, Company NMLS #1972934. Peter Njoku is individually licensed as NMLS #2670329. Equal Housing Lender.
